query: This repo uses the agents-stack starter. Figure out which harness phase should own the next step before anyone writes code.

query: Resume the active agents-stack sprint after a timeout and decide whether execution, review, or state reconciliation owns the next move.
why: The request is resume-first and needs family routing based on durable state.

query: Set up the agents-stack live state, reference docs, and sprint workflow files for a fresh repo.

query: Fix the dark mode contrast bug in App.tsx and ThemeProvider.tsx and make the UI look better.
why: This is ordinary implementation work, not a request to choose among harness workflow phases.

query: Plan a new analytics dashboard feature and write the acceptance criteria.
why: Without explicit agents-stack workflow routing or repo-state ambiguity, this is general planning work rather than family routing.
